creator: martys1oi@att.net
text:
math/vtk9 Freebsd 13.1-RELEASE amd64
used by cad/opencascade, cad/kicad

Build for port math/vtk9 fails reporting the following error very late in the build:

[ 95% 9173/9642]
FAILED: /lib/qml/VTK.9.2/libqmlvtkplugin.so lib/qml/VTK.9.2/plugins.qmltypes /usr/ports/math/vtk9/work/.build/lib/qml/VTK.9.2/plugins.qmltypes
QQMLComponent: Component is not ready

Issue is observed and duplicates on multiple machines with 13.1-RELEASE amd64 O/S. Performing a make deinstall rmconfig clean prior to running the build does not resolve the issue. Problem appeared in the build about two weeks ago.
